summary: Comprehensive testing completed for FinFlow personal finance tracker. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows and integrations working correctly. No critical issues found.

issues: Console deprecation warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' and 'shadow* style props are deprecated' - React Native Web compatibility warnings, not critical

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
All interactive elements have testID attributes
Proper React Native components used throughout
Error handling implemented with try-catch blocks
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing seeded data: 1 bill (Rent, Housing, $1200) and 1 expense (Lunch, Dining, $15). Created test data during testing: 1 bill (Test Electric Bill, Utilities, €120), 1 expense (Test Coffee, Dining, €5.50), 1 savings goal (Emergency Fund, €2000/€10000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs fully functional with proper CRUD operations. Frontend mobile UI working correctly with all tab navigation, forms, and data display functional. Integration between backend and frontend verified. Currency changes persist correctly (EUR selected and saved). Dashboard calculations accurate. No bugs found.

backend_tests.bills_crud: PASSED - create, read, delete all working
backend_tests.expenses_crud: PASSED - create, read, delete all working
backend_tests.expenses_default_date: PASSED - auto-generates date if not provided
backend_tests.savings_goals_crud: PASSED - create, read, update, delete all working
backend_tests.dashboard_calculations: PASSED - totals and cashflow calculated correctly

dashboard_tab.metric_cards: PASSED - Salary, Bills, Expenses, Net Left all visible
dashboard_tab.savings_goals: PASSED - can add and display goals
